skill_description: Bid-project scope rules for roofing. Use when starting, triaging, validating, or packaging a commercial roofing bid.
scope_rule: Base bid is limited to roofing systems defined by the profile: membrane or steep-slope roofing, roof insulation, cover board, flashing, and roof-related sheet metal. Wood blocking and nailers, structural decking, roof drains, and below-grade waterproofing must be explicitly included, excluded, or flagged before pricing.
proposal_exclusions: wood blocking and nailers unless listed
roof drains and overflow plumbing by others
